title: BEM-631 proof results check
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return None
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {'parse_error':True,'raw':p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:2000]}

claude_path='governance/provider_gates/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json'
delivery_path='governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json'
hourly_state_path='governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json'
claude=load(claude_path)
delivery=load(delivery_path)
hourly=load(hourly_state_path)
claude_ok=isinstance(claude,dict) and claude.get('claude_runtime_proven') is True
delivery_ok=isinstance(delivery,dict) and delivery.get('delivery_confirmed') is True
hourly_sent=isinstance(hourly,dict) and hourly.get('telegram_delivery')=='sent'
status='complete' if claude_ok and (delivery_ok or hourly_sent) else 'proof_pending_or_failed'
blocker=None if status=='complete' else {'code':'RUNTIME_OR_DELIVERY_PROOF_NOT_COMPLETE','claude_runtime_proven':claude_ok,'delivery_confirmed':delivery_ok,'hourly_sent':hourly_sent,'claude_result_exists':claude is not None,'delivery_result_exists':delivery is not None,'hourly_state_exists':hourly is not None}
result={'schema_version':'runtime_delivery_results_check.v1','bem':'BEM-631','status':status,'claude_runtime_proven':claude_ok,'delivery_confirmed':delivery_ok,'hourly_sent':hourly_sent,'claude_result':claude,'delivery_result':delivery,'hourly_state':hourly,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:31 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem631_runtime_delivery_results_check.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(result,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem631_runtime_delivery_results_check.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-631 | Runtime Delivery Results Check | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:31 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Claude runtime proven'+sep+str(claude_ok)+sep+sep+'## Delivery confirmed'+sep+str(delivery_ok or hourly_sent)+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem631_runtime_delivery_results_check','cycle_id':'bem631-runtime-delivery-results-check','source':'gpt_monitor','status':status,'claude_runtime_proven':claude_ok,'delivery_confirmed':delivery_ok or hourly_sent,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:31 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem631_runtime_delivery_results_check']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'claude_runtime_proven':claude_ok,'delivery_confirmed':delivery_ok or hourly_sent,'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['runtime_delivery_results_status']=status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:31 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem631_runtime_delivery_results_check.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-631: status='+status+' claude_runtime_proven='+str(claude_ok)+' delivery_confirmed='+str(delivery_ok or hourly_sent)+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Checked Claude runtime smoke and Telegram delivery verification results after trigger')
"""
No issue comments.
